commit.message:
feat: show emoji reactions on kanban cards with smart visibility

- EmojiReactionBar: add `compact` prop — in compact mode the "Add reaction"
  button is opacity-0 and only fades in on parent group-hover, keeping
  empty cards visually clean
- EmojiReactionBar: add `onReactionsChange` callback so parent components
  can react to reaction count changes (e.g. for conditional border display)
- TaskCard: add `group` class to the card motion.div so compact
  group-hover effects work correctly on the card itself
- TaskCard: track `hasReactions` state via onReactionsChange callback;
  show the divider border permanently when reactions exist, and only on
  hover when the card has no reactions yet — this makes reaction pills
  always clearly visible once added while keeping empty cards uncluttered

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
v1.4: Scripting engine, quick buttons, popout editor & more (#28)

* Remove old Fly.io Rust proxy

The WebSocket proxy has been migrated to a Cloudflare Worker (proxy-worker/).
The Fly.io account has expired and this code is no longer needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix web disconnect and remove debug console.logs

- Send status message to client on disconnect so the UI updates
- Remove 8 debug console.log calls from useAllocations.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix password manager autofill and remove debug logs

- Give each character slot unique name/autocomplete section attributes
  so password managers don't overwrite both slots with the same credentials
- Remove 8 debug console.log calls from useAllocations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add retry with exponential backoff to Dropbox uploads

- uploadFile retries up to 4 times on 429/5xx errors (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s backoff)
- Non-retryable errors (4xx except 429) fail immediately
- If all retries fail, the file is recorded as a pending upload so it
  gets retried on next page load during initial sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix Dropbox sync overwriting allocations and add not-connected state to AllocPanel

Dropbox initial sync now uses remote data entirely for non-skill files instead
of shallow-merging with localStorage, preventing stale local data from
corrupting allocation profiles. AllocPanel shows "Not connected" until the
user logs in, matching the WhoPanel pattern. Also includes web meta tags,
favicons, OG image, settings panel storage section, and layout fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add StorageModeButton component

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add configurable numpad operator keys and /counter toggle command

Numpad /, *, -, and . are now configurable in Settings instead of
hardcoded. Adds /counter toggle to smart-toggle between start/pause.
Defaults: / = /counter info, * = /counter toggle, - = /movemode, . = survey.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add v1.4 features: screenshot mode, alloc panel fix, version bump

Version bump to 1.4.0, screenshot capture to clipboard, alloc panel
not-connected state, Dropbox sync fixes, output filter updates, and
toolbar/icon additions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix screenshot failing in desktop app

navigator.clipboard.write with image blobs isn't supported in Tauri's
WebView2. Use @tauri-apps/plugin-clipboard-manager for desktop, keep
web Clipboard API as fallback for browser. Also show actual error
message on failure instead of generic text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix screenshot capture using html-to-image for DOM renderer

xterm.js v6 uses a DOM renderer (no canvas elements). Replace direct
canvas reads with html-to-image to rasterize the .xterm-screen DOM,
then composite onto the window chrome canvas as before.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Enable image-png feature for Tauri clipboard image support

Image.fromBytes requires the image-png Cargo feature on tauri.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add JavaScript scripting engine with CodeMirror editor

Adds a script mode for triggers and aliases with a full JS sandbox
(AsyncFunction-based), cached compilation, and injected API: send(),
echo(), delay(), spam(), setVar(), getVar(), plus capture variables.

Includes a Global Script panel for shared functions/constants, and
replaces plain textareas with CodeMirror 6 editors featuring syntax
highlighting, line numbers, bracket matching, and Tab/Shift+Tab
indentation across all script editing surfaces.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix script editor scrolling and make chat Mine filter visual-only

Script editor: fill full panel height, enable mouse wheel scrolling,
remove unused minHeight prop. Chat Mine filter: always capture own
messages and toggle visibility at display time instead of discarding
at capture time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add multi-line trigger matching

Triggers can now buffer lines between a start pattern and end pattern
(regex), then fire with the joined text. Ideal for tells and messages
that wrap across multiple lines. Toggle "Multi-line" in the trigger
editor and set an end pattern. Max 10 lines safety cap, buffers clear
on disconnect.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix script editor height overflow in trigger and alias panels

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add scripting support to timers and per-timer status bar visibility

Timers now support JavaScript script mode (matching aliases and triggers)
with Text/Script toggle, CodeMirror editor, and JS badge. Each timer
also has a "Show countdown in status bar" toggle to control whether its
badge appears next to the command input.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add configurable command separator and quick buttons

The command separator (used to chain multiple commands) is now
configurable in Settings > Output. Default is ";;" for new installs,
";" preserved for existing users via migration. This prevents single
semicolons in natural text from being treated as separators.

Also adds Quick Buttons — customizable command buttons between the
terminal and status bar with command and script modes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add category totals to skill panel and simplify header

Shows total improvement count at the bottom of the skill list,
reflecting whichever category tab is active. Removes character
name from the panel title.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add lastUserInputTime() script API for idle detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Pin skill panel totals bar to bottom of panel

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add popout script editor modal with save button and syntax help

Script editors in side panels are cramped for complex JavaScript. Now
hovering any ScriptEditor reveals an expand button that opens a large
centered modal (70vw x 60vh) with real-time sync, a Save button,
line count, and a syntax help popover showing the full script API.
All 5 consumers (triggers, aliases, timers, global scripts, quick
buttons) get the feature automatically with zero changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add smart trigger phrases for intent-based skill matching

Auto-generates natural-language trigger phrases for every registry entry
by analyzing each skill description. Triggers are the primary matching
signal, improving routing accuracy over keyword matching.

- New: generate-triggers.py script (runs during rebuild)
- New: TRIGGER column in registry TSV
- New: Manual trigger override via trigger: frontmatter field
- Updated: SKILL.md routing logic prioritizes TRIGGER matching
- Updated: README with Smart Triggers documentation

Mover coluna RG para após Status e centralizar conteúdo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: stop brain from disowning capabilities + fix task auto-queue default

Three root causes for Sentinel saying "I can't do any of this":

1. DEFAULT_AGENT_PROMPT never told the LLM it owns a real task board,
   Sentry, and all other integrations. Added explicit capability block
   listing task_create/read/update, Sentry, and cross-interface memory
   with hard rules: NEVER say "I don't have access" for registered skills.

2. _build_augmented() labelled cross-session context as "recent activity
   from other sessions" — the LLM correctly identified it as external and
   disowned it. Reframed as "Your own prior activity — cross-interface
   memory" so the LLM treats it as its own memory, not injected data.

3. TaskCreateSkill defaulted approval_level=2 (needs review), but
   scan_pending_tasks only picks up approval_level=1 tasks. Tasks created
   without an explicit approval_level sat in pending forever. Changed
   default to 1 (auto-approve) so the queue picks them up within 60s.
   Also added task queue behaviour explanation to the system prompt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace favicon with sun icon in PNG and ICO formats

Rendered favicon.svg → 64x64 PNG via macOS qlmanage, then wrapped in ICO
format. PNG favicon listed first in index.html for broadest browser support.

commit.message:
Add trackpad click input, hold threshold slider, camera zoom bindings

- Trackpad click (DualSense/Steam) as supported unmapped input
- UC10 expanded to cover trackpads alongside grip buttons
- Hold threshold slider (0.25s default, 0.15–0.50s range) in both KB+M and controller settings

commit.message:
fix: use WORKFLOW_TOKEN owner identity for git commits in schedule and init workflows (#1828)

GitHub does not re-register cron schedules for workflow files pushed by
github-actions[bot]. Use `gh api /user` with the WORKFLOW_TOKEN to resolve
the PAT owner's identity, so pushes are attributed to a human actor and
GitHub processes schedule changes.

Also adds PLAN_MISSION_SEEDS.md and REPORT_MISSION_BENCHMARKS.md.

commit.message:
feat: v0.1.4 — DataGrid sort persistence across tab switches

- Add sort state (SortMemberPath + SortDirection) to ServicesViewModel,
  StartupViewModel, and NetworkViewModel so state survives View recreation
- Add x:Name and explicit SortMemberPath to all DataGrid columns in
  ServicesView, StartupView, and NetworkView (text columns without an
  explicit SortMemberPath return null in the Sorting event handler)
- Implement OnLoaded/OnUnloaded sort save+restore in ServicesView,
  StartupView, and NetworkView; fix the same bug in ProcessesView
- Fix root-cause async guard issue: col.Sort() posts ProcessSort via
  Dispatcher.UIThread.Post, so the finally{_restoringSort=false} block
  fired before async Sorting callbacks, allowing them to overwrite VM
  state. Fix: reset _restoringSort via Post (same priority = FIFO) so
  the guard stays up until all callbacks complete
- Drop col.ClearSort() calls — single-sort mode already clears other
  columns; ClearSort() (Ctrl+Click) incorrectly added unsorted columns
  to a multi-sort instead of removing them
- Bump version to 0.1.4

fix(ios): add NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription to Info.plist

Required for Permissions.RequestAsync<LocationWhenInUse>() calls in
LocationPickerService and PlacesAutocompleteService. Without this key
iOS crashes immediately on the permission request. Background location
is not needed — driver tracking polls AdminAPI over HTTP, not device GPS.
